tech_news.title: Starfield's PS5 port manages roughly 140K sales in a week, estimates analyst firm - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Starfield's PS5 port has sold 140K units so far, falling below some previous Xbox releases on Sony's console, but it's got a long road ahead.

tech_news.title: Back button hijacking to be penalised in Google crackdown - bbc.com
tech_news.description: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.

tech_news.title: Family advice: My brother found himself a gold digger. She has the wrong idea about me. - Slate
tech_news.description: She can consider this a permanent embargo.

tech_news.title: Report: God of War Faye Spin-Off Claimed to Feature Tyr and Multiple Mythologies - MP1st
tech_news.description: The next God of War game is said to be a spinoff starring Faye and even Tyr. MP1st has learned more about its mythologies, too.

tech_news.title: The Trump phone has a new look — but it's still not clear when it will be released - Business Insider
tech_news.description: There's no information on the website about when the phone will be released, and its "Made in the USA" claims have been further watered down.

tech_news.title: Google rolls out April Android Canary build with experimental features for Pixel devices - Android Authority
